title: Somehow I Started Living with an Otaku NEET Kunoichi
overview: Kunoichi Shizuri saves average salaryman Tsukasa from a near death experience!

title: Somehow a Perverted Kunoichi Showed Up
overview: Tsukasa forgets his lunch which sets of a series of events leading to Ayame’s arrival.

title: Somehow a Kunoichi with Very Bad Luck Showed Up
overview: After sending Ayame away, a new kunoichi appears.

title: Somehow I Was Targeted by a CPL Kunoichi
overview: Tsukasa goes out on his own and is ambushed.

title: For Some Reason, Kunoichi Lovers Moved In
overview: Tsukasa discovers something about Ayame during a fight with a Yoma.

title: Somehow a Rom-Com Loving High School Girl Was Monitoring Me
overview: Shizuri is disappointed by a lack of lovey-dovey feelings.

title: Somehow I Suffered for a Date
overview: Shizuri is determined to find out Tsukasa's feelings toward her.

title: Somehow I Fully Enjoyed My Akiba Date
overview: Tsukasa asks Shizuri to accompany him shopping in Akihabara.

title: Somehow the High School Girl Reached a New Love Frontier
overview: When Tsukasa and Shizuri went on their Akiba date, Himari staked out in the bushes to snoop.

title: Somehow a Tsundere Kunoichi Showed Up
overview: Hina drives back a Yoma that has ambushed her master, Toru.

title: Somehow a Kunoichi Maid Burst Onto the Scene
overview: Hina's extremely bad luck is out of control.

title: Somehow I Decided to Quit Being a NEET
overview: The kunoichi succeeds in paying off the debt owed to Saya.

title: Somehow the Former NEET Did Her Best with Chores and Work
overview: Shizuri decides to stop being a NEET. How hard could that be?

title: Somehow the Strongest Assassin Appeared
overview: Evidently, hard enough that withdrawal sets in.

title: Somehow This Became a Fighting Anime
overview: Killa and Crena launch an attack, trying to kidnap Tsukasa.

title: Somehow Supporting Characters Have Started to Shine
overview: Kanna, Hina, and Ayame rush to help Shizuri, who is in a very tight spot.

title: Somehow I Was Asked to Continue Being a NEET
overview: Tsukasa confesses to Shizuri how he truly feels.

title: Somehow an Old Story Began
overview: The reason for Saya's actions and secrets will be revealed.

title: Somehow There Was Bedlam in the Bathhouse
overview: Shizuri and the others visit a luxury bathhouse with jacuzzis, showers, massage chairs.

title: Somehow the Tsundere Kunoichi's Sister Showed Up
overview: Shizuri and the others visit a luxury bathhouse with jacuzzis, showers, massage chairs.

title: Somehow the Troublesome Sisters Spoke of Their Memories
overview: A brokenhearted Yuzu wanders around the city after seeing her beloved sister Kanna as a tsundere maid.

title: Somehow I Started a Neighborhood Friendship with a High School Girl I'm Basically Meeting for the First Time
overview: Shizuri and Himari face each other in a tense atmosphere.

title: Somehow Perversion and Bad Luck Formed a Team
overview: Hina's improved luck comes with an unlucky side effect, derailing her "special training" with Ayame.

title: The NEET Kunoichi Somehow Had a Drinking Party
overview: Later, a drinking party causes utter chaos!
